title: task
description:
Implement key derivation from Ed25519 link-layer keys to X25519 ECDH keys for EDHOC.

Per spec section 8.8:
x25519_private = SHA-512(ed25519_seed)[0:32]
x25519_public  = X25519(x25519_private, basepoint)

This allows reusing the existing Ed25519 keypair for EDHOC key agreement without storing additional keys.

References:
- RFC 8032 (Ed25519)
- RFC 7748 (X25519)
- spec/06-security.md section 8.8

Parent: project-LICHEN-dujw (EDHOC subsystem)
close_reason: Fixed: Added x25519_private and x25519_public properties to Identity class per spec section 8.8. Derivation uses SHA-512(seed)[0:32] for private key and X25519 scalar multiplication for public key. Added comprehensive tests including known vectors and ECDH verification.
